violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed build up of powder in cappucino dispenser.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed boxes of single use cups on floor in storage area.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Observed wet wiping cloths on counter rather than in bucket of sanitizing solution.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed heavy grease build up in ovens.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
